# Finish My Sentence

> A browser voice demo where you speak the start of a sentence, stop, and a voice agent
> completes it in one funny line — with a live latency HUD. Deepgram handles speech-to-text
> (Flux), turn detection, and text-to-speech (Aura-2); Together AI runs the LLM that finishes
> the sentence. A thin Node proxy holds both API keys and relays the audio WebSocket.

Key facts an agent should know before editing:
- The Node proxy is NOT in the LLM path. Deepgram calls Together directly via the Settings `think.endpoint`.
- `experimental: true` in the Settings is required for the `AgentStartedSpeaking` latency event the HUD reads.
- Latency fields (`total_latency`, `ttt_latency`, `tts_latency`) are in seconds.
- Both API keys are server-side only; the browser `/config` endpoint exposes HUD settings, never keys.
- Audio: input linear16 16 kHz, output linear16 24 kHz.

## Docs
- [README.md](README.md): humans — setup, run, troubleshooting, stage controls.
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): AI coding agents — commands, invariants, how to extend.
- [docs/ARCHITECTURE.md](docs/ARCHITECTURE.md): the Deepgram Settings message and server-event contract, in detail.
- [FRAGMENTS.md](FRAGMENTS.md): tested opener lines for the demo.

## Source
- [src/server/agent.ts](src/server/agent.ts): shared config loader and Settings builder (edit the Settings shape here).
- [src/server/proxy.ts](src/server/proxy.ts): static server + WebSocket relay.
- [src/server/check.ts](src/server/check.ts): no-browser connection + round-trip smoke test (`npm run check`).
- [config/agent.config.json](config/agent.config.json): model, prompt, turn-detection thresholds, HUD scale.
- [public/app.js](public/app.js): browser client — mic send, playback, barge-in, HUD, localStorage.
- [public/recorder-worklet.js](public/recorder-worklet.js): mic capture + resample to linear16 16 kHz.

## External
- Deepgram Voice Agent: https://developers.deepgram.com/docs/voice-agent
- Voice Agent Settings: https://developers.deepgram.com/docs/voice-agent-settings
- Voice Agent server events: https://developers.deepgram.com/docs/voice-agent-outputs
- BYO LLM endpoint: https://developers.deepgram.com/docs/voice-agent-llm-models
- Together AI inference: https://docs.together.ai
